title: Salmān Bāk Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Salmān Bāk with a Z-Score of +3.86. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Salmān Bāk has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 12.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 29%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is at 18.3 km/h. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high, indicating a high number of cooling degree days.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical heat wave.
